title: notanthera lanceolatus
intro: Notanthera lanceolatus, also known as Yellow Jacket or Yellow Bells, is a perennial plant species in the Acanthaceae family native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Notanthera lanceolatus include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
